name: standards-conformance report enumerates one section per active standard source
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:
  - owasp-asvs
  - typescript-handbook
' > .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --active .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '^## owasp-asvs' STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md && grep -q '^## typescript-handbook' STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md && echo ok 1>&2
